data.name: Sample - Cyware CTIX - 2.0.0
data.description: Sample playbooks for "Cyware CTIX" connector. If you are planning to use any of the sample playbooks in your environment, ensure that you clone those playbooks and move them to a different collection, since the sample playbook collection gets deleted during connector upgrade and delete.

workflows.name: Bulk IOC Lookup (Advanced)
workflows.description: Performs a lookup for threat data objects in the CTIX platform and retrieves the details of the objects, such as basic details, enriched data, and relations.

workflows.name: Bulk Add Relation
workflows.description: Add a relation to multiple threat data objects.

workflows.name: FileHash > Cyware CTIX > Enrichment
workflows.description: Retrieve the reputation of indicator of type ‘FileHash’ using Cyware CTIX

params.value:
Cyware CTIX Detection Summary
Score
{% if vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score > (vars.malicious_score.split('-')[1] | int) %}
{{vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score}}
{% elif vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score > (vars.suspicious_score.split('-')[1] | int) %}
{{vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score}}
{% elif vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score > (vars.good_score.split('-')[1] | int) %}
{{vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score}}
{% else %}
{{vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score}}
{% endif %}

arguments.verdict: {% if vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score > (vars.malicious_score.split('-')[1] | int) %}{{"Malicious"}}{% elif vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score > (vars.suspicious_score.split('-')[1] | int) %}{{"Suspicious"}}{% elif vars.steps.Get_Reputation_Hash.data.results[0].score > (vars.good_score.split('-')[1] | int) %}{{"Good"}}{% else %}{{"No Reputation Available"}}{% endif %}

routes.name: Compute Enrichment Summary -> Return Output Data
Is Reputation Found -> Compute Enrichment Summary
routes.label: Yes

workflows.description: Retrieves the enrichment data for the given object and tool ID.

arguments.title: Cyware CTIX: Get Enrichment Object Details

workflows.name: Search IP
workflows.description: Searches for an IP address in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the IP address you have specified.

workflows.name: Create Intel via Open API
workflows.description: Create intel with additional details such as the source and collection. You can also include details for each object, such as description, notes, custom attributes, and more.

arguments.title: Cyware CTIX: Create Intel via Open API

routes.name: Start-> Create Intel via Open API

workflows.name: Get Enriched Threat Data
workflows.description: Returns the enriched data of a threat data object using enrichment tools.

arguments.title: Cyware CTIX: Get Enriched Threat Data

workflows.name: Search URL
workflows.description: Searches for a URL in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the URL you have specified.

workflows.name: Run Report
workflows.description: Runs a report and sends the file to the recipients

workflows.name: Create Tag
workflows.description: Creates a tag in the CTIX platform

workflows.name: Search CVE ID
workflows.description: Searches for a CVE ID in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the ID of the CVE you have specified.

workflows.name: Get Threat Data
workflows.description: Returns a list of threat data objects from the CTIX application. You can retrieve a maximum of 500,000 threat data objects using this API.

workflows.name: Bulk Mark/Unmark False Positive
workflows.description: Mark or unmark multiple IOCs as false positives.

arguments.title: Cyware CTIX: Bulk Mark/Unmark False Positive

workflows.name: Bulk Lookup and Create (Deprecated)
workflows.description: This API fetches the list of threat data objects present in the CTIX application. In case some IOCs are not present in the application, you can choose to ingest the missing IOCs and create new records. You can lookup and further ingest a maximum of 1000 IOCs in the application at any moment.

arguments.title: Cyware CTIX: Bulk Lookup and Create

workflows.name: Search Domain
workflows.description: Searches for a domain in the Cyware threat intelligence platform and retrieves relevant details from CTIX based on the domain name you have specified.

workflows.name: Create Custom Attribute
workflows.description: Create a custom attribute in the platform.

workflows.name: Bulk IOC Lookup and Create Intel
workflows.description: Performs a bulk IOC lookup by fetching a list of threat data objects present in the CTIX application. If some IOCs are not present in the application, then you can choose to ingest the missing IOCs and create new records. NOTE: You can perform the lookup and further ingest a maximum of 1000 IOCs in the application at any moment.

steps.name: Bulk IOC Lookup and Create Intel

arguments.name: Cyware CTIX
arguments.operationTitle: Bulk IOC Lookup and Create Intel

arguments.title: Cyware CTIX: Bulk IOC Lookup and Create Intel

routes.name: Start-> Bulk IOC Lookup and Create Intel
